description_long: This is a large, modern sniper rifle with a robust, angular design and a matte metallic finish. The rifle features a long, heavy barrel with a prominent muzzle brake at the end, designed to reduce recoil. It is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its precision for long-range targeting. The stock is fixed and ergonomic, with a pistol grip and a solid buttstock for stability. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity, rapid-reload capability. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for high-powered, precision rifles used in urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, heavy sniper rifle with a long barrel, scope, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte metallic tones. Features include a prominent muzzle brake and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel, with the scope and receiver visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, scope, fixed stock, and magazine, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the back of the scope, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
